pricing.seoDescription: StoryTub plans and pricing. Start free, upgrade anytime.
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more
pricing.bundlesSubtitle: One time credit packs. No expiry.

faq.q1: Can I try StoryTub for free?
faq.a1: Yes! Every new account gets 5,000 free credits to generate videos. No credit card required.
faq.q2: What happens when I run out of credits?
faq.a2: You can upgrade your plan for monthly credits or purchase a one time credit bundle.
faq.q3: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a3: Yes. You can cancel anytime from your billing page. You keep access until the end of your billing period.
faq.a4: Credits from bundles never expire. Subscription credits reset each billing cycle.
faq.a5: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and Apple Pay through Stripe.

billing.title: Billing

home.heroDescription: Generate scripts, voiceovers, and captions in French and English. Try it free, no signup required.
home.noCard: No credit card required. Start in seconds.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to create amazing videos

feature1.title: AI Script Generation
feature1.description: Write engaging scripts automatically with advanced AI. Just enter a topic and get a ready to use script.

feature2.title: Multilingual Support
feature2.description: Create videos in English and French. Reach a wider audience without extra effort.

feature3.title: Natural Voiceovers
feature3.description: Professional AI voices that sound natural. Choose from built in voices or clone your own.

feature4.title: Automatic Captions
feature4.description: Captions generated and synced automatically. Boost accessibility and engagement.

feature5.title: Video Templates
feature5.description: Choose from ready made templates for different styles and formats. Get started faster.

feature6.title: Fast Rendering
feature6.description: Videos rendered in minutes, not hours. Get your content ready to publish quickly.

home.testimonial1: StoryTub saves me hours every week. The AI scripts are surprisingly good.
home.testimonial2: I can finally create short videos for both English and French audiences.
home.testimonial3: The voice quality and automatic captions are a game changer for my business.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to create your first video?
home.ctaDescription: Join thousands of creators using AI to produce engaging short videos.

features.metaDescription: Explore StoryTub features: AI scripts, voiceovers, captions, templates, and more.
features.title: Powerful features for video creators
features.subtitle: Everything you need to go from idea to published video in minutes.

aiScripts.title: AI Script Generation
aiScripts.description: Enter a topic and let AI write a compelling, structured script for your video. Supports multiple tones and styles.

voiceover.title: Natural Voiceovers
voiceover.description: Choose from high quality AI voices or clone your own voice. Every word sounds natural and professional.

captions.title: Automatic Captions
captions.description: Captions are generated and perfectly synchronized with the audio. Increase reach and accessibility.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
multilingual.description: Create content in English and French. Scripts, voices, and captions all work seamlessly in both languages.

templates.title: Video Templates
templates.description: Start with professionally designed templates. Customize colors, fonts, and layouts to match your brand.

fast.title: Fast Rendering
fast.description: Your video is rendered in the cloud and ready to download in minutes. No heavy software needed.

branding.title: Custom Branding
branding.description: Add your logo, brand colors, and fonts to every video. Maintain a consistent visual identity.

analytics.title: Usage Analytics
analytics.description: Track your credit usage, video count, and generation history from your dashboard.

safe.title: Secure & Private
safe.description: Your data is encrypted and stored securely. We never share your content with third parties.

about.metaDescription: Learn about StoryTub, our mission, and the team behind AI video generation.
about.title: About StoryTub
about.mission: We believe everyone should be able to create professional quality videos. StoryTub uses AI to make video creation fast, affordable, and accessible to all creators.
about.storyContent: StoryTub was born from a simple observation: creating short videos takes too long. Between writing scripts, recording voiceovers, adding captions, and editing, creators spend hours on a single video. We built StoryTub to automate the entire process using AI, so you can focus on what matters most: your ideas.

value1.title: Simplicity
value1.description: Powerful tools that anyone can use. No video editing experience required.

value2.title: Accessibility
value2.description: Affordable pricing and a generous free tier so everyone can get started.

value3.title: Innovation
value3.description: We are always pushing the boundaries of what AI can do for content creators.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with the StoryTub team. We are here to help.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question or feedback? We would love to hear from you.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.sentDescription: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

terms.metaDescription: StoryTub terms of service and usage conditions.
terms.title: Terms of Service

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using StoryTub, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

accounts.title: 2. User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must provide accurate information when creating your account.

credits.title: 3. Credits and Payments
credits.content: Credits are used to generate videos. Subscription credits reset each billing cycle. Bundle credits do not expire. All payments are processed through Stripe.

content.title: 4. User Content
content.content: You retain ownership of the content you create using StoryTub. You are responsible for ensuring your content does not violate any laws or third party rights.

ip.title: 5. Intellectual Property
ip.content: StoryTub and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by StoryTub and are protected by international copyright and trademark laws.

prohibited.title: 6. Prohibited Uses
prohibited.content: You may not use StoryTub to create content that is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, harassing, defamatory, or otherwise objectionable.

limitation.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: StoryTub shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of the service.

termination.title: 8. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your account at any time without prior notice if you breach these terms.

changes.title: 9. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.content: For questions about these terms, contact us at support@storytub.com.

privacy.metaDescription: StoryTub privacy policy and data handling practices.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide when creating an account (email, name), usage data (videos created, credits used), and technical data (IP address, browser type).

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use your information to provide and improve our service, process payments, send important notifications, and provide customer support.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with service providers (Stripe for payments, Supabase for hosting) who help us operate the platform.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and preferences. We also use analytics cookies to understand how our service is used. You can manage your cookie preferences.

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.content: We implement industry standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit and at rest.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. You can request deletion of your account and associated data at any time.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can also request a copy of your data or restrict its processing.

children.title: 8. Children's Privacy
children.content: StoryTub is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

changes.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or in app notification.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.content: For privacy related questions, contact us at support@storytub.com.

blog.metaDescription: Read the latest articles on AI video creation, content strategy, and more.

policy.title: Terms & Privacy
